stemHtml: Is there any difference between the vertical speed versus forward speed curves for two identical aeroplanes having different masses? (assume glide with zero thrust and wind)

options.a: Yes, the difference is that for a given angle of attack both the vertical and forward speeds of the heavier aeroplane will be larger.
options.b: Yes, the difference is that the lighter aeroplane will always glide a greater distance.
options.c: Yes, the difference is that the heavier aeroplane will always glide a greater distance.
